Background-Soldier — Female Human Fighter
Strength: 14 (+2) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 16 (+3) Wisdom: 11 (+0) Charisma: 11 (+0)
Background: Soldier Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Constitution; Dexterity; Strength Experience: 158/300 Level: 1 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes: Ability Boosts: 3 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +2
Feat Count: Fighting Style: 1; General: 0; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighter Primary Ability)
Feats: Great Weapon Fighting; Magic Initiate (Druid) Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Fighter Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Fighter Primary Ability; Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion; Perception, Survival); Strength; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Soldier Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Strength, Dexterity, Constitution); Savage Attacker; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Intimidation); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Gaming Set)
Feature Notes:
Fighter Primary Ability: 1 selection
Fighting Style: +1 Fighting Style Feat
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +0 Performance: (cha) +0
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +3
Athletics: (str) +4 Medicine: (wis) +0 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +4
Deception: (cha) +0 Nature: (int) +3 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +3 Perception: (wis) +0 Survival: (wis) +0
Skill Proficiency: Animal Handling; Athletics; Intimidation; Perception, Survival; Persuasion; Sleight Of Hand
Tool Proficiency: Dice Set: (wis)
Skill Notes:
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Bulky Armor: Has disadvantage on Stealth
Combat
Hit Points: 7 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 18
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Scale Mail Shield: Shield Weapons: Battleaxe (+4 1d8+2 S [2h d10]; Topple); Longsword (+4 1d8+2 S [2h d10]; Sap); Scimitar (+4 1d6+2 S; Nick); Unarmed Strike (+4 1+2 B)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Great Weapon Fighting: Can treat 1s and 2s as 3s on two-handed weapon damage
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points 2 times per long rest; can regain 1 use after a short rest
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 3 chosen kinds of Simple or Martial Melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +0; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +4; Wisdom: +0
Magic
Attack: D: +2 Spell DC: D: 10
Magic Notes: Magic Initiate (Druid): Knows 2 Druid cantrips and can cast a chosen D1 spell once per long rest
